howItWorks.label: Your Journey
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From your first message to stepping aboard — we handle everything.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us your dates, group size, and dream destination. We listen first — every charter starts with understanding what matters to you.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Within 24 hours, you receive a handpicked selection of yachts, itineraries, and insider recommendations — tailored exclusively to your group.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We handle every detail — contracts, provisioning, captain briefing, concierge requests. You just arrive and sail.

filotimo.label: The Philosophy
filotimo.intro: A word that exists only in the Greek language. Untranslatable in English, French, German, or any other tongue. First written by the poet Pindar in the 6th century BCE. Referenced by the Apostle Paul. Carried through 400 years of Ottoman rule. Still alive in every Greek who lives by it.
filotimo.pillar1Desc: Acts of kindness without expectation of return. Taking care of others as if they were family — not because you must, but because you cannot imagine doing otherwise.
filotimo.pillar2Desc: Not the honour of titles or praise, but the quiet dignity of doing what is right when no one is watching. A standard you hold for yourself, not one imposed from outside.
filotimo.pillar3Desc: If you lack filotimo, you embarrass not just yourself — but your family, your community, your name. It is the invisible thread that holds Greek society together.
filotimo.application: At George Yachts, filotimo is not a marketing word.
filotimo.example1: It means telling a client that a yacht is wrong for them — even when it would be the easier sale.
filotimo.example2: It means answering the phone at midnight because a guest has a question about their itinerary.
filotimo.example3: It means protecting your investment with transparent contracts and honest pricing — no hidden fees, no surprises.
filotimo.example4: It means treating your journey as if it were our own — because in the Greek way of thinking, it is.
filotimo.quote: "Filotimo to the Greeks is like breathing. A Greek is not a Greek without it."

panels.panel1Title: CREWED YACHT CHARTER | IN GREEK WATERS
panels.panel1Text: From the Cyclades to the Ionian, from the Saronic Gulf to the Sporades — George Yachts curates crewed yacht charters across every Greek sailing region. Our fleet of 50+ motor yachts, sailing catamarans, and monohulls is handpicked for quality, crew excellence, and guest experience.
panels.panel2Text: Unlike aggregator platforms with thousands of listings and no personal touch, George Yachts operates as a boutique brokerage — one broker, one relationship, one standard. Every yacht is personally vetted. Every captain is known by name. IYBA member, MYBA contracts, transparent pricing.
panels.panel3Text: Your experience extends far beyond the deck. Private jet transfers, luxury villas, Michelin dining, bespoke itineraries. One point of contact for everything — from touchdown at Athens International to your final sunset anchorage.
panels.panel4Text: Weekly rates from €5,900 to €235,000. Clear contracts, fast proposals, and an IYBA member broker who answers the phone personally. Yacht charter as it should be — precise, discreet, and genuinely personal.

aboutUs.heading: ABOUT US
aboutUs.subtitle: ABOUT US BOUTIQUE YACHT BROKERAGE & MEDITERRANEAN EXPERTISE
aboutUs.p1: George Yachts is a premier boutique brokerage house specializing in high-end motor-yacht charters across Greece and the Mediterranean.
aboutUs.p2: We bridge international operational standards with deep local expertise to craft bespoke maritime experiences. Yachts are our core. Around them, we deliver a seamless 360° layer of lifestyle services—private aviation (helicopters & jets), VIP ground transfers, luxury villa stays, and discreet real-estate advisory—ensuring your journey is effortless from touchdown to sunset.
aboutUs.p3: We leverage a global network of captains, owners, and licensed operators to secure the perfect vessel and crew, alongside the right villa and flight—all through a single, professional point of contact.
aboutUs.p4: Our Commitment: Clear pricing (APA/VAT), fast proposals, and precise itineraries. Calm power, clear results.

calculator.title: Charter Cost Calculator
calculator.subtitle: See exactly what your yacht charter will cost. No hidden fees. No surprises. Complete breakdown including APA, VAT, and transfers.
calculator.vatNote: Greek charter VAT — applied to charter rate only
calculator.apaNote: Advance Provisioning Allowance — fuel, food, marina fees (not taxed)
calculator.charterTotalNote: Charter + VAT + APA · Final price · No hidden fees
calculator.disclaimer: Estimates based on standard rates. Actual APA may vary by itinerary. VAT applies to Greek-flagged vessels. Final pricing confirmed in your charter agreement.
calculator.selectToBeginDesc: Choose your yacht, season, and group size to see a complete cost breakdown.

quiz.question: Question
quiz.q1o1: A rooftop cocktail watching the sun set over the sea
quiz.q1o2: A long walk through quiet streets, ending at a waterfront taverna
quiz.q1o3: Anchoring in a hidden bay, dinner under the stars on deck
quiz.q1o4: A table at the best restaurant in town, local wine flowing
quiz.q2: When you travel, you're drawn to...
quiz.q2o1: Energy, style, and being where things are happening
quiz.q2o2: Silence, space, and the absence of crowds
quiz.q2o3: History, culture, and places with stories to tell
quiz.q2o4: Raw beauty — landscapes that stop you in your tracks
quiz.q3o1: Organised with sunbeds, a bar, and beautiful people nearby
quiz.q3o2: Completely empty — just you and the water
quiz.q3o3: A pebble cove with a taverna serving fresh fish
quiz.q3o4: A volcanic shore that looks like another planet
quiz.q4o1: Chef's table at a Michelin-level restaurant
quiz.q4o2: Slow-cooked fish bought from a local fisherman that morning
quiz.q4o3: A picnic on deck with fresh bread, cheese, and wine
quiz.q4o4: A long family-style feast where everyone shares everything
quiz.q5: If you could only bring one thing on the yacht...
quiz.q5o1: My camera — I need to capture everything
quiz.q5o2: A great book — I want to disappear into it on deck
quiz.q5o3: My playlist — music makes every moment better

hiw.s1Desc: Tell us what matters to you — dates, group size, budget, preferred islands, pace, interests. A 15-minute call or a simple form is all it takes. No commitment, no pressure.
hiw.s1Detail: George personally handles every inquiry. You'll never speak to a call centre.
hiw.s2Desc: Within 24–48 hours, you'll receive a curated shortlist of 3–5 yachts — each personally vetted, with photos, crew profiles, pricing breakdown, and George's honest assessment of each option.
hiw.s2Detail: We include APA and VAT estimates upfront. No surprises after you commit.
hiw.s3Desc: Once you've chosen, we handle the MYBA charter contract — the industry standard used worldwide. Clear terms, transparent pricing, professional protection for both parties.
hiw.s3Detail: A 50% deposit secures your dates. Balance due 4 weeks before embarkation.
hiw.s4Desc: In the weeks before your charter, we coordinate everything: crew preference sheets, bespoke itinerary planning, airport transfers, provisioning, and any special requests.
hiw.s4Detail: Need a private chef for a birthday dinner on a remote beach? Consider it done.
hiw.s5Desc: Step aboard, meet your crew, and forget everything else. Your captain knows the route. Your chef knows your preferences. Your broker is a phone call away if you need anything — but you won't.
hiw.s5Detail: This is what you came for. The rest is handled.
hiw.closing: Five steps. One broker. Zero stress.

itin.whyTrustDesc: Every route below has been personally sailed and refined by George Biniaris — drawing on deep local knowledge of Greek waters. These are not generic suggestions. They are tested, trusted, and designed to deliver the best possible week aboard.
itin.designDesc: These routes are starting points. Every charter is personally tailored by George — your preferences, your pace, your islands. Tell us your dream and we'll design your perfect week in Greek waters.
